examples: The traditional fungi taxology depends on the morphological and physio - biochemistry and antigen construct feature.
Present status of phytochemistry and its derived subjects-phytochemistry ecology, phytochemistry taxology and phytochemistry economy were reviewed.
The latest development and application prospect of Inonotus obliquus is summarized in following aspects: taxology, bionomy, cultivation on manpower and development tendency in medicine.
